phrases.intent_en: Ask where the audio guide counter is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está el mostrador de audioguías?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh eh-STAH el mohs-trah-DOHR deh ow-dee-oh-GHEE-ahs?

likely_response.translation_en: At the back on the left.

responses.english: At the back on the left.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to access the upper floor galleries
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿cómo subo a las galerías superiores?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, ¿KOH-mo SOO-bo a las ga-leh-REE-as soo-peh-ree-OH-res?

likely_response.local: Use el ascensor situado junto a la entrada.
likely_response.pronunciation: OO-seh EHL ah-sthehn-SOHR see-too-AH-doh HOON-toh AH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah
likely_response.translation_en: Use the elevator located next to the entrance.

responses.english: Use the elevator located next to the entrance.
responses.phonetic: OO-seh EHL ah-sthehn-SOHR see-too-AH-doh HOON-toh AH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah
responses.local: Use el ascensor situado junto a la entrada.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Villalón Palace courtyard is
phrases.text_local: ¿Dónde está el patio del Palacio de Villalón?
phrases.pronunciation: DOHN-deh es-TAH el PAH-tyoh del pah-LAH-syoh deh vee-yah-LOHN?

likely_response.local: Siga recto, está al final del recorrido.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-gah REHTH-toh EHSTÁ AHL fee-NAHL DEHL reh-kohr-REE-doh
likely_response.translation_en: Go straight, it is at the end of the tour.

responses.english: Go straight, it is at the end of the tour.
responses.phonetic: SEE-gah REHTH-toh EHSTÁ AHL fee-NAHL DEHL reh-kohr-REE-doh
responses.local: Siga recto, está al final del recorrido.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the museum shop is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la tienda del museo?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DOH-deh es-TA la TYEN-da del mu-SEH-oh?

likely_response.local: En la planta baja, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH PLAHN-tah BAH-hah AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: On the ground floor, on the right.

responses.english: On the ground floor, on the right.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH PLAHN-tah BAH-hah AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.local: En la planta baja, a la derecha.
